meta.title: We Offsite — Corporate Retreats for Remote Teams
meta.description: B2B corporate retreat planning for remote teams. Strategy, logistics, and unforgettable offsite experiences.

meta.title: About Us — We Offsite
meta.description: We help distributed and remote companies plan corporate retreats with 100% policy compliance, dedicated experts, and 80% less planning time.

hero.title: We help companies take their teams anywhere
hero.subtitle: At We Offsite, our mission is to revolutionize corporate event planning for distributed and remote companies. We enable organizations to achieve unprecedented savings and 100% compliance when planning and booking corporate retreats. Our comprehensive approach helps you save over 80% of the time typically spent organizing company offsites.

mission.label: Our mission
mission.title: Travel Organizers and Event Managers: We're here for you!

expertise.title: Our Expertise
expertise.desc: Planning corporate events and team trips shouldn't be a headache. Our proprietary technology drastically reduces the time your team spends planning your corporate retreat, ensuring 100% budget and policy compliance. We transform complex processes into a seamless experience.

purpose.title: Our Purpose
purpose.desc: Our aim is to expand organization's capabilities while enriching their employee's careers with new learning and bonding opportunities. We believe optimizing resources and streamlining processes are two core elements within every successful organization.

model.title: Our Model
model.desc: We apply the same principles for ourselves: with our client's interests in mind, we have optimized our resources to ensure every company gets a 1:1 dedicated expert to support them every step of the way. From initial planning to on-site execution.

offsites.title: Company Offsites
offsites.desc: Bring your distributed and remote teams together through meaningful encounters and rewarding work. A successful corporate retreat provides energizing time away from the office, cementing culture and collaboration.

events.title: Corporate Events
events.desc: The logistics behind offsite meetings, summits or conferences can be time-consuming. Optimize your resources by letting our expert team handle everything.

meetups.title: Team Meet Ups
meetups.desc: We believe in the power of coming together to strengthen relationships. Our solutions facilitate impactful team building activities fostering connection and collaboration.

expenses.title: Full control over expenses
expenses.desc: Find out if your team trip is within budget before you start booking.

rates.title: Lower than public rates
rates.desc: We expertly negotiate on your behalf everything from accommodation to meeting rooms.

support.title: Dedicated 1-on-1 support
support.desc: We optimize our resources to ensure a dedicated expert is with you every step of the way.

time.title: 80% of planning time saved
time.desc: We streamline the offsite planning process and turn it into an effortless experience.

policy.title: Every booking within policy
policy.desc: Set a company policy and receive approval requests right in your inbox.

allInOne.title: Everything in the same place
allInOne.desc: Transport, accommodation, venues, activities, transfers, meals, swag, visas—all covered.

finalCta.title: Start saving on your next company retreat
finalCta.subtitle: Instantly save 80% of the time you spend organizing team trips, offsite meetings, and company retreats. We Offsite transforms complex offsite planning into an easy experience.

meta.title: Benefits — We Offsite
meta.description: Smart venue search, 100% policy compliance, transparent budgets, exclusive rates, and dedicated end-to-end support for corporate retreats.

hero.label: Smart search for offsite venues
hero.title: A cost-effective team retreat starts with the right choices
hero.subtitle: Compare travel costs for each candidate offsite location, and learn which dates are the cheapest for your team retreat to take place.

search.title: Smart search for offsite venues
search.desc: Compare travel costs for each candidate offsite location, and learn which dates are the cheapest for your team retreat to take place.

compliance.title: Achieve 100% compliance on your offsite trip
compliance.desc: Ensure your employees book their offsite travel according to company policy. Easily verify the status of each offsite trip and get an overview of costs before booking your team's travel, ensuring you stay within budget.

venues.title: Simplified offsite venue sourcing
venues.desc: Easily find the perfect venue for your corporate retreat. From skyscrapers to secluded cabins in the countryside or castle stays—let us know your requirements, and we will prepare a selection of venues after negotiating with suppliers to present you with the best places for your team offsite.

expense.title: Transparent offsite expense control
expense.desc: Master your offsite budget and maximize savings. Receive a full budget before choosing an offsite location, including travel, accommodation, meeting venues, meals, activities, and transfers. Easily compare costs with your budget ensuring cost-effective team offsites and maximizing your corporate travel savings.

stats.stat2Label: Corporate retreats for which we successfully negotiate lower rates
stats.stat3Label: Average time you save planning offsite trips
stats.stat4Label: Reasons not to bring your team together!

rates.title: Enjoy exclusive negotiated rates
rates.desc: Benefit from lower-than-public rates, from discounted rooms to waived resort fees. Our expert team negotiates on your behalf so you can enjoy the most competitive rates and maximize your budget when booking your team offsite.

agenda.title: Create and share your team retreat agenda
agenda.desc: Easily create a program for your team building retreat or company offsite and share it with your team so everyone stays informed. Keep things flexible with our tool: edit or remove events, and your team will see updates in real time.

support.label: Dedicated end-to-end support
support.title: Get personalized assistance at all times

changes.title: Changes and cancellations
changes.desc: Let us help if your plans change.

travel.title: Day-of-travel assistance
travel.desc: Contact our team if you have any issues on the travel day.

accommodation.title: Accommodation management
accommodation.desc: We negotiate rates and contract terms with venues.

advice.title: Expert planning advice
advice.desc: Reach out to us anytime and benefit from our team's expertise on company offsite planning.

hero.title: Save 80% of your time planning your company retreat or event
hero.subtitle: At We Offsite we are event planning experts. We help remote companies organize unique team retreats, optimizing costs and logistics.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: From brief to offsite in 6 weeks
howItWorks.step1Desc: We learn your team's goals, culture, and budget.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Venues, activities, and logistics tailored to your needs.
howItWorks.step3Desc: We handle flights, hotels, and the full agenda. You just connect.

meetings.title: Strategic Meetings
meetings.desc: Find the ideal environment for productive work sessions.

retreats.title: Annual Retreats
retreats.desc: Kick-offs designed to strengthen remote corporate culture.

logistics.title: Full Logistics
logistics.desc: We handle everything: from flights and hotels to technical equipment.

caseStudies.title: Case studies
caseStudies.subtitle: Companies that trust us for their corporate retreats
caseStudies.label: Case studies
caseStudies.pageSubtitle: Discover how distributed teams around the world plan unforgettable offsites with We Offsite — from Park City to Phuket, Barcelona to the Algarve.

meta.title: Case Studies — We Offsite
meta.description: Corporate retreat success stories: Graphite, Kayzen, Paperlike, Incident.io, OPTI Digital, Balena, and Definely.

calendly.title: Book a call and organize your retreat hassle-free

cta.title: Get free proposals for your corporate event
cta.subtitle: We analyze your team's goals to present personalized proposals for accommodation, teambuilding and logistics.
